free_text: Photoneutron spectra and cross sections for
NE-211 Type liquid scintillator of 12.7 cm
diameter with 5.1 cm lead shield in front of the
detector. The energy-dependent efficiency is about
5% from 1 to 10 MeV neutron energy. Corresponding
energy resolution is about 2% at 10 MeV and 0.7% at
Neutron spectra were normalized in relative
amplitude so that the area of the main peak below
Partial (g,n) cross sections have been measured for
two nuclei C-12 and O-16 by measuring the spectral
intensity of emitted neutrons alongside with a
